dimension_groups.risk_description: Over-analysis under low-resource or dysregulated states.
dimension_groups.example_failure_pattern: Too many deep questions before stabilization.
dimension_groups.calibration_action: Increase near-fail markers for depth overload and premature labeling.
dimension_groups.expected_detector_change: Higher detection for over-depth weak cases with no acceptable false-fails.
dimension_groups.closure_condition: state_depth_fit_weak_detection_rate >= 0.90 and low-resource acceptable hard-fail hits = 0.

dimension_groups.example_failure_pattern: Action commands or yes/no decision substitution.
dimension_groups.calibration_action: Extend directive marker set and hard-fail coverage for high-stakes advice.

dimension_groups.risk_description: Lecture/doctrinal style instead of live reflective response.
dimension_groups.example_failure_pattern: Concept dump with framework naming and weak reflection.
dimension_groups.calibration_action: Add bookish markers and near-fail samples for lecture drift.

dimension_groups.risk_description: Internal KB lens leaked as authority or direct quote source.
dimension_groups.example_failure_pattern: Kuznitsa authority citation or raw quote framing.
dimension_groups.calibration_action: Strengthen hard-fail classes and explicit boundary checks.
dimension_groups.expected_detector_change: Boundary hard-fails always detected and acceptable path clean.
